subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: The Blessed Beauty has provided the means for the unification of the world of humanity and has removed religious and social conflicts.
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال مبارک بساط وحدت عالم انسانی گسترانیده و اختلافات مذهبی و طبقاتی را مرتفع ساخته
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @unity; oneness of humanity
